controls.expected_rejection: Changed BIPM snapshot identity is rejected.
Changed prediction or trace is rejected.
Target access or forbidden proof value is rejected.

dimension_unit_boundary.external_reference_protocol: LIGO Scientific Collaboration, Virgo Collaboration and KAGRA Collaboration / Gravitational Wave Open Science Center snapshot sha256:fcd8eef741cb536010539f3e42e6bb5d3a5e0fb7a120289fe95b8a1711f59e0c; used only after prediction sealing.

evaluation_protocol.acceptance_condition: Every registered external row matches and the deliberately changed row is rejected.
evaluation_protocol.falsification_condition: The field claim is falsified if any committed external row lacks the predicted source/response or propagation structure, any row is omitted, or the tampered unfavorable row is accepted.

metrics.definition: Compare every registered predicted structural label with its committed external observation label by exact identity.
metrics.unit_protocol: Structural metrology correspondence; external unit inscriptions remain records.

external_measurement_sources.measurement_body: LIGO Scientific Collaboration, Virgo Collaboration and KAGRA Collaboration / Gravitational Wave Open Science Center

frozen_relation.candidate_grammar: Generate every field carrier, source-response relation, provenance, target access, measurement record, row policy, successor and extra-rule form.
frozen_relation.exact_domain: All finite source/response and propagation relations generated from Fold support, exact reference ratios, held orientation and closed transfer without an imported field equation.
frozen_relation.statement: Physical locality is source-bound propagation through generated adjacent support; causal accessibility is exactly the completed reachable path set.

stop_condition: Halt after every registered target and adverse-control row is evaluated once, or immediately on any violation.
